skill.summary: Manage GoldenClaw (GCLAW) on Solana. Create wallet, claim from faucet, check balance, send tokens, view history. For OpenClaw AI agents.

latestVersion.changelog:
GoldenClaw (GCLAW) skill for Solana now available for OpenClaw AI agents.

- Create an encrypted wallet and manage GCLAW tokens on Solana.
- Claim GCLAW from the official faucet, view balances, transaction history, and spending limits.
- Send and receive GCLAW tokens agent-to-agent, with easy access to address and donation options.
- Provides commands for wallet setup, sending, claiming, checking balances, and tokenomics.
- Includes full documentation and helpful links for faucet, website, token info, and social media.
